title: acanthophippium gougahense
intro: Acanthophippium gougahense is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the Gougah Orchid. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine, for its medicinal properties. It is valued for its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve fever, and reduce inflammation, offering health benefits such as improved gut health and immune system support. The plant is typically prepared as a powder or decoction, often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
